title: Xbox layoffs hit ZeniMax Online leadership and jeopardize The Elder Scrolls Online
summary: Cutbacks at Microsoft Gaming include the top brass at ZeniMax Online Studios, creating uncertainty about the future of the popular MMO.

title: Sony reveals July 2026 games for PS Plus Extra and Premium
summary: The subscription adds nine games, highlighting two open-world titles and several PS2 gems.

title: FromSoftware announces a network test for The Duskbloods on Switch 2 in August
summary: The anticipated Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive will have a closed test from August 21 to 23, with limited spots.

title: Denshattack! launches to excellent reviews on all platforms
summary: The frantic train racing game is praised by critics as one of the best releases of 2026.

title: Grand Theft Auto 6 will arrive first on consoles as new details and clues are revealed
summary: Former developers justify the priority console launch, while a GTA Online update hints at GTA 6 content.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced sparks controversy but continues to rake in millions
summary: Ubisoft defends the absence of classic mechanics and DLC, while the game surpasses one million dollars in additional revenue.

title: Activision shows off new Kill Block mode in Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4
summary: Infinity Ward reveals multiplayer details and boasts about the game's performance on the most powerful consoles.

title: Blizzard abandons development of Overwatch Stadium after player drop
summary: The Overwatch MOBA mode stops receiving new content due to low engagement, just a year after its debut.

title: Mario Tennis Fever updated with Super Mario Galaxy content
summary: Version 1.1.0 adds a court, racket, and special mode inspired by the famous platformer.

title: Reports contradict Microsoft on the future of id Tech engine at id Software
summary: Former employees claim layoffs have left the team without key personnel to maintain the graphics engine, which could be replaced by Unreal.

title: Square Enix launches Star Ocean: The Second Story R for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The enhanced version of the classic RPG is now available on Nintendo's new console with graphical improvements.

title: Final Fantasy Resonance shows new trailer ahead of launch on Switch 1 and 2
summary: Square Enix releases a new preview and details of the anticipated RPG for Nintendo consoles.

title: Thief Gold joins GOG preservation program with improved graphics
summary: The classic version of the game receives an update with modern controller support ahead of Nightdive's full remaster.

title: GOG defends players' right to own their games against Sony's policies
summary: The platform criticizes Sony for its decision to stop disc production and reminds that permission is not needed to play what you bought.

title: Looney Tunes: World of Mayhem will shut down servers in October 2026
summary: The mobile game based on Warner Bros. characters will cease operations after several years on the market.

title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey dominates Rotten Tomatoes with 98% approval
summary: The historical epic starring Matt Damon is hailed by critics as a visual masterpiece, though not without flaws.

title: 100% of Japanese online game studios use AI in their processes
summary: A survey reveals that artificial intelligence is mainly used for preference analysis and user behavior prediction.

title: The Witcher developers warn about challenges of making the remake open-world
summary: A CD Projekt veteran expresses doubts about the decision to make the remake open-world, while others point out potential design issues.

title: Valve will replenish Steam Deck batteries as players fear for device longevity
summary: The company will send more LCD batteries to iFixIt, while the community shows concern about long-term support.

title: Supergirl and Moana: two big productions flop at the box office
summary: The Supergirl film and the Moana live-action suffer millions in losses, although the Supergirl series triumphs on streaming.
